articles.description: The Premier League season has been defined by set-piece drama. It came to a head at West Ham on Sunday, when the VAR could have penalised any one of a handful of potential fouls.
articles.title: Premier League corners: Five fouls in one move - breaking down corner chaos

articles.description: Follow live text commentary, score updates and match stats from Tottenham Hotspur vs Leeds United in the Premier League
articles.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Leeds United LIVE: Premier League preview, team news, stats & head-to-head

articles.description: Who will make the cut when England name their first Test squad of the summer?
articles.title: England Test squad: Who will face New Zealand?

articles.description: Marcus Rashford has an uncertain future despite the on-loan Manchester United forward scoring a brilliant free-kick for Barcelona in El Clasico.
articles.title: Marcus Rashford's Barcelona future remains uncertain

articles.description: England’s 2006 World Cup squad was a ‘golden generation’ – David Beckham, Wayne Rooney, Rio Ferdinand, Steven Gerrard, Frank Lampard. Why did it go wrong in Baden-Baden and why did some people blame the WAGs
articles.title: Golden Generation

articles.description: Coco Gauff avoids an Italian Open upset - and a serious blow to her French Open preparations - by fighting back from a set down again in Rome.
articles.title: Italian Open 2026: Coco Gauff shows spirit to beat Iva Jovic in Rome

articles.description: Liverpool release images of a planned memorial to late forward Diogo Jota and his brother Andre Silva, following their deaths last summer.
articles.title: Diogo Jota: Liverpool release images of memorial to late forward

articles.description: Victor Wembanyama is ejected for the first time in his NBA career as the San Antonio Spurs are beaten by the Minnesota Timberwolves.
articles.title: Victor Wembanyama ejected for flagrant foul as San Antonio Spurs beaten by Minnesota Timberwolves

articles.description: Chelsea are starting to make contact with prospective managerial candidates as they move towards appointing the club's next permanent head coach, including Andoni Iraola, Xabi Alonso, Marco Silva, and Oliver Glasner.
articles.title: Chelsea contact prospective candidates in search for new head coach

articles.description: Former Manchester City striker Edin Dzeko is set to join exclusive list of players aged over 40 to play in a World Cup.
articles.title: Bosnia World Cup squad: Edin Dzeko to join list of plays aged over 40 to play at a World Cup
